---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in griid-trace
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear description of what actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- griid-trace version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Rust version: [e.g., 1.80]
- Python version (if using adapter): [e.g., 3.11]

## Trace File (if applicable)
If the bug is related to parsing a specific trace.jsonl file, please provide a sanitized version (remove sensitive data).

## Logs
```
Paste any relevant logs here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
